## Test plan

- [ ] `ruff check src/` passes
- [ ] `mypy --ignore-missing-imports --no-strict-optional src/macroflow` passes
- [ ] `PYTHONPATH=src pytest tests/ -q` passes
- [ ] Manually exercised the feature in the running app
- [ ] Verified existing flows didn't regress (grid resize, hotkey fire,
      preset recall, Resolve quadrant, Videohub recall — whichever apply)
